meaning: n.杰出人物,知名人士adj.有价值的,应...的,可敬的,值得的,相称的
examples: A number of the report's findings are worthy of note.
He felt he was not worthy of her.
The bank might think you're worthy of a loan.
Check out these five impact-worthy apps to help you fit paying it forward into your daily routine.
What they share is a commitment to country that has been tested and proved worthy.
